programmes.show_name: When Buildings Collapse: World's Worst Disasters
programmes.show_description: Rob Bell examines some feats of engineering that came down to earth with a bang, including a huge bridge failure in Genoa in 2018 that killed 43 people.

Mummy Pig is determined that George's new hat doesn't get muddy when Peppa and George visit Grandpa and Granny Pig.
For Captain Daddy Dog's birthday, Mummy Dog surprises him with her present of a trip on a canal boat.
Holly goes with Ben and Mr Elf to the farm to collect an egg for the Kingdom's breakfast. But a huge chicken escapes from the farm so Holly and the elves have to chase it.
James and Norman try to be the best superheroes in town.
Peppa and her friends are at Rebecca Rabbit's house for an Easter Egg hunt. But can they find the Easter Bunny hiding all of the chocolate eggs?
Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power. Then Mr Bull makes have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power!
The biggest musical event on Sodor is right around the corner but an errant operatic note causes chaos. Can Sodor get in tune, singing on time and on key - together?
The Cadets team up with Parkhill Vets to help keep our furry friends happy and healthy! They use a special tool to look inside a dog's ears and check a cat's blood pressure.
Sam and Kit are called in to the Australian jungle to catch a thief stealing blue objects from the locals. Can they catch this bandit before he strikes again?
Patrick and SpongeBob experience the wonders of the workforce.

In Benidorm the staff at the Rio Park and its sister hotel the Flamingo Oasis are gearing up to go the extra mile for their guests as it's Gala Dinner night.
While Jane takes a safari tour of Corfu, Tony Robinson dives in Thailand, and Jennie Bond takes a unique tour of Lisbon accompanied by a friend.

programmes.show_name: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programmes.show_description: Investigators seek a fare dodger thought to be scamming Transport for London with over £5,000 in unpaid fares. And a man caught without a valid ticket proves uncooperative.
In Northamptonshire, Colin deals with a car that has ran out of petrol near Watford services, and in Skye, recovery driver Cara is out to collect a car with a punctured tyre. (Ep8)

Gym Class: Madame Gazelle takes the children to Grampy Rabbit's gym class, where they learn how to be real explorers.
A bored Fluff discovers a wooden ruler while waiting for Tweedy to play with him. It gives Tweedy an idea for some seesaw fun that they can both enjoy! (Ep29)
When Squiggle discovers three golden coins in his piggy bank, he wonders what he could do with them... Badger and Scratch's juice stand turns out to be the perfect, bubbly solution. (Ep16)

When Pip becomes obsessed with his 'get well soon' card for Posy, she shows him that just being able to spend time with him is the very best gift of all.
Rubble moves with his family of construction pups to the nearby town of Builder Cove where they live, play, and build whatever the community needs.
Peppa learns that Mummy Pig used to keep a diary when she was her age, so Peppa decides to give it a try.
Grandpa Pig and Grandad Dog are on their boats when Grandpa Pig drops an anchor on his foot! After an x-ray and plaster cast at the hospital, Grandpa Pig needs to stay overnight.
Tim tries to help Tia face the new Rocket track ride.
Tracker and Carlos come across a series of nocturnal animals fleeing the Shadow Jungle. Tracker, with Ryder and the pups' help, must brave his fear of the dark and stop new villain Lucita Mala.

programmes.show_name: Peppa Pig: Around the World Special
programmes.show_description: When Peppa's family car breaks down, Miss Rabbit lends them her plane and they find themselves swept off on an adventure all around the world.

programmes.show_name: New: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programmes.show_description: A woman pulled over for driving without a full licence has her own theories as why she's been stopped. And reports come in of a car that's linked to drugs.
